message:
🐛 Redirect kubestellarconsole.netlify.app to console.kubestellar.io (#2519)

The default Netlify subdomain (kubestellarconsole.netlify.app) serves the
same deployment as the custom domain (console.kubestellar.io), but since
localStorage is scoped per origin, user state (tour completion, settings)
diverges between the two URLs.

Add a 301 redirect in the seo-meta edge function so that all traffic to
the Netlify subdomain is sent to the canonical custom domain. Deploy
preview URLs are unaffected (their hostnames include a prefix).

Closes #2456

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
